runners.formComment: Latest effort finished 6th on April 9 over 390m at Warrnambool behind One Last Beer beaten 7 lengths (22.45) in a Free For All. Better than the last couple of runs suggest. Expected to do much better.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished 6th on April 9 over 390m at Warrnambool behind One Last Beer beaten 7 lengths (22.45) in a Free For All. Better than the last couple of runs suggest. Expected to do much better.

runners.formComment: Hit the ground running with a fast early sectional but found one better when runner up over 450m at Shepparton clocking 25.48. Strong form emerging from the that last run. Leading chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Hit the ground running with a fast early sectional but found one better when runner up over 450m at Shepparton clocking 25.48. Strong form emerging from the that last run. Leading chance.

runners.formComment: Struggling to break through but racing consistently, finishing in the minors four starts on end. Last time out flew the lids with a fast early sectional but gathered in and finished in the minors when third (19.56) at Healesville over 350m. Thereabouts of late and rates highly this line-up. Expected to be in the finish.

formComments.title: TAB

runners.formComment: Flew the lids with a strong early split and led throughout to score an impressive win by 2.75 lengths over 410m at Horsham (23.59). Has claims if at his best.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Flew the lids with a strong early split and led throughout to score an impressive win by 2.75 lengths over 410m at Horsham (23.59). Has claims if at his best.

runners.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Warrnambool (22.62) in a Grade 5, finishing a 7 length fourth. Yet to win but has placed three times from this draw. Has ability but looking elsewhere this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Didn't make the placings last time at Warrnambool (22.62) in a Grade 5, finishing a 7 length fourth. Yet to win but has placed three times from this draw. Has ability but looking elsewhere this time.

runners.formComment: Backs up after winning by 1.5 lengths at Warragul (22.94) beating Unleash Me in a Grade 5 on April 10 five days ago. This is much harder assignment and he needs to find another gear.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Backs up after winning by 1.5 lengths at Warragul (22.94) beating Unleash Me in a Grade 5 on April 10 five days ago. This is much harder assignment and he needs to find another gear.

runners.formComment: Big odds last time but hit the ground running with a strong early split, giving a sight but fading only late to finish third (22.76) at Geelong over 400m. Ran one of the fastest times on the program last start despite finishing in the minors. Pay to follow.

formComments.title: TAB

runners.formComment: Missed the frame last time but was in the minors two on end prior to that, the most recent when second (22.60) over 390m at Warrnambool. Has to overcome a wide draw and looks safely held.

runners.formComment: Has finished sixth at his last couple of starts, most recently at this track over 390m. Capable of taking this out.

runners.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage sixth last time out over 390m at this track. Needs to find a bit more to test these.
